summary: Frontend-only testing of Recharts trend comparison charts in Predictive Intelligence tabs. All 12 test cases passed. Charts render correctly with proper data visualization.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads for employer fajju2001@gmail.com / test123
Growth tab - Line chart renders with 'Workforce Trend — Actual vs Projected' title
Growth chart has legend: Actual, Projected, ALE Threshold
Growth chart has red dashed ALE threshold reference line at 50 FTE (stroke: #f43f5e, strokeDasharray: 6 3)
Exposure tab - 'Penalty Exposure Forecast (6 months)' chart renders with Penalty A, Penalty B, Worst Case lines/area
Exposure summary cards show $0 current exposure, $4,200 employer cost, $260,110 worst case
Scenario tab - Drop MEC preset selectable and Run Scenario button works
Scenario 'Visual Comparison' horizontal bar chart appears with Current vs After Scenario bars
Scenario chart shows FTE Count, MEC %, FT Employees comparison bars
Scenario penalty bar shows $0 current vs $50,490 after scenario
Alerts tab shows 2 alerts (ALE Status, Enrollment/Unenrolled)
Guided Compliance Workflow card renders at the bottom with Start Workflow button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recharts trend comparison charts fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) Growth tab has ComposedChart with solid blue line for Actual, dashed blue line for Projected, and red dashed ReferenceLine at y=50 for ALE threshold. 2) Exposure tab has ComposedChart with Area for Worst Case (gray fill), Line for Penalty A (rose), Line for Penalty B (amber). 3) Scenario tab has horizontal BarChart (layout='vertical') showing FTE Count, MEC %, FT Employees with blue bars for Current and purple bars for After Scenario. Penalty comparison shown separately below chart. All charts use ResponsiveContainer and Recharts library.
